plugin.changelog: v0.5.0 — phase summaries: discover/evaluate/plan/scaffold .summary.{json,md} + run.summary.md roll-up; new slz-plan-summary CLI

_comment: Baseline source: Azure-Landing-Zones-Library contains both ALZ and SLZ platform trees. Pinned to the latest main commit at implementation start (2026-04-16) and refreshed on a quarterly cadence. Every file in data/baseline/ must match its upstream SHA — verified by scripts/slz_readiness/evaluate/baseline_integrity.py.
